paragraphs.text:
%md
## Connect Agents to Enterprise Data at Big Star Collectibles

### The Business Problem

Big Star Collectibles deployed AI chatbots to help item officers answer client questions. The problem? The chatbots don't know Big Star Collectibles' actual guidelines, policies, or client information.

*"I asked the AI what guidelines we offer preferred customers. It said 6.5%. Our actual preferred rate is 7.9%. I almost quoted wrong guidelines to a client!"*

*"The AI doesn't know our policies. It gives generic answers about 'typical lending practices' when clients need our specific requirements."*

Without access to enterprise data, AI assistants are worse than useless. They're confidently wrong.

### What You'll Learn

In this lab, you'll see the transformation that happens when agents get access to real business data:

1. **Without data:** Ask about Big Star Collectibles item guidelines. Watch the AI give generic (or wrong) answers.
2. **With data:** Connect the agent to actual item policies and client information.
3. **The difference:** The same question now returns real guidelines, real requirements, real client details.

Enterprise data is what turns a generic AI into YOUR AI—one that knows your business.

**What you'll build:** An agent connected to Big Star Collectibles' item policies and applicant data.

**Estimated Time:** 10 minutes

msg.data:
Connect Agents to Enterprise Data at Big Star Collectibles

The Business Problem

Big Star Collectibles deployed AI chatbots to help item officers answer client questions. The problem? The chatbots don't know Big Star Collectibles' actual guidelines, policies, or client information.

"I asked the AI what guidelines we offer preferred customers. It said 6.5%. Our actual preferred rate is 7.9%. I almost quoted wrong guidelines to a client!"

"The AI doesn't know our policies. It gives generic answers about 'typical lending practices' when clients need our specific requirements."

Without access to enterprise data, AI assistants are worse than useless. They're confidently wrong.

What You'll Learn

In this lab, you'll see the transformation that happens when agents get access to real business data:

  1. Without data: Ask about Big Star Collectibles item guidelines. Watch the AI give generic (or wrong) answers.
  2. With data: Connect the agent to actual item policies and client information.
  3. The difference: The same question now returns real guidelines, real requirements, real client details.

Enterprise data is what turns a generic AI into YOUR AI—one that knows your business.

What you'll build: An agent connected to Big Star Collectibles' item policies and applicant data.

Estimated Time: 10 minutes

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Ask the LLM About Big Star Collectibles' Item Rates

Let's start by asking the raw LLM (SELECT AI CHAT) about Big Star Collectibles' item products. This goes directly to the LLM with no access to your business data.

**Watch what happens:** The LLM gives a generic response. It might describe typical item guidelines or say it doesn't know. Either way, it can't tell you YOUR guidelines because it has no access to Big Star Collectibles' data.

msg.data:
Ask the LLM About Big Star Collectibles' Item Rates

Let's start by asking the raw LLM (SELECT AI CHAT) about Big Star Collectibles' item products. This goes directly to the LLM with no access to your business data.

Watch what happens: The LLM gives a generic response. It might describe typical item guidelines or say it doesn't know. Either way, it can't tell you YOUR guidelines because it has no access to Big Star Collectibles' data.

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Ask the LLM About a Specific Applicant

Now ask about a specific item applicant in your system.

**Watch what happens:** The LLM has no applicant data. It might make something up (hallucinate), admit it doesn't know, or give generic advice. It cannot tell you anything about YOUR applicant APPL-1001.

msg.data:
Ask the LLM About a Specific Applicant

Now ask about a specific item applicant in your system.

Watch what happens: The LLM has no applicant data. It might make something up (hallucinate), admit it doesn't know, or give generic advice. It cannot tell you anything about YOUR applicant APPL-1001.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT AI CHAT Is applicant APPL-1001 eligible for a premium rate item at Big Star Collectibles;

%md
## Create Big Star Collectibles' Enterprise Data

Now let's create the business data that makes an agent useful for Big Star Collectibles. You'll create:

1. **item_policies**: Big Star Collectibles' actual item products, guidelines, and requirements
2. **item_applicants**: Real applicant records with credit scores, income, and eligibility

This is the knowledge the agent needs to answer business-specific questions accurately.

msg.data:
Create Big Star Collectibles' Enterprise Data

Now let's create the business data that makes an agent useful for Big Star Collectibles. You'll create:

  1. item_policies: Big Star Collectibles' actual item products, guidelines, and requirements
  2. item_applicants: Real applicant records with credit scores, income, and eligibility

This is the knowledge the agent needs to answer business-specific questions accurately.

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Create the Data Access Functions

These functions become the agent's "eyes" into Big Star Collectibles' enterprise data. Each function queries your tables and returns formatted information the agent can use.

- **get_item_policy**: Retrieves item policies by type and optionally by customer tier
- **get_applicant_info**: Retrieves applicant details including credit score, income, and eligibility

msg.data:
Create the Data Access Functions

These functions become the agent's "eyes" into Big Star Collectibles' enterprise data. Each function queries your tables and returns formatted information the agent can use.

  • get_item_policy: Retrieves item policies by type and optionally by customer tier
  • get_applicant_info: Retrieves applicant details including credit score, income, and eligibility

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Register the Tools

Register both functions as agent tools. The instructions tell the agent when to use each tool. Item policy questions use ITEM_POLICY_TOOL, applicant questions use APPLICANT_LOOKUP_TOOL.

msg.data:
Register the Tools

Register both functions as agent tools. The instructions tell the agent when to use each tool. Item policy questions use ITEM_POLICY_TOOL, applicant questions use APPLICANT_LOOKUP_TOOL.

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Create the Big Star Collectibles Item Agent

Create an agent that has access to your enterprise data tools. The role tells the agent it works for Big Star Collectibles and should always use its tools. Never guess about guidelines or applicant information.

msg.data:
Create the Big Star Collectibles Item Agent

Create an agent that has access to your enterprise data tools. The role tells the agent it works for Big Star Collectibles and should always use its tools. Never guess about guidelines or applicant information.

paragraphs.text:
%md
## Activate the Big Star Collectibles Agent

Set the team so the Big Star Collectibles agent handles your requests.

msg.data:
Activate the Big Star Collectibles Agent

Set the team so the Big Star Collectibles agent handles your requests.

paragraphs.text:
%script
EXEC DBMS_CLOUD_AI_AGENT.SET_TEAM('BIGSTAR_ITEM_TEAM');

%md
## Ask About Collector Card Item Rates Again

Now ask the SAME question you asked the raw LLM earlier. This time, the agent has access to Big Star Collectibles' policy data.

**Watch the difference:** Instead of generic advice, you get YOUR actual guidelines: 7.9% APR for preferred customers, $100,000 maximum, no origination fee, same-day approval for amounts under $50K. This is your real business policy, not a guess.

msg.data:
Ask About Collector Card Item Rates Again

Now ask the SAME question you asked the raw LLM earlier. This time, the agent has access to Big Star Collectibles' policy data.

Watch the difference: Instead of generic advice, you get YOUR actual guidelines: 7.9% APR for preferred customers, $100,000 maximum, no origination fee, same-day approval for amounts under $50K. This is your real business policy, not a guess.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT AI AGENT What are the current appraisal guidelines for collector card submissions for preferred customers;

%md
## Ask About the Specific Applicant Again

Now ask about applicant APPL-1001 again.

**Watch the difference:** The agent looks up the applicant and reports factual information: Acme Industries LLC, PREFERRED tier, 780 credit score, $450K income, 27.8% debt-to-income, premium eligible = YES. Real data, not hallucination.

msg.data:
Ask About the Specific Applicant Again

Now ask about applicant APPL-1001 again.

Watch the difference: The agent looks up the applicant and reports factual information: Acme Industries LLC, PREFERRED tier, 780 credit score, $450K income, 27.8% debt-to-income, premium eligible = YES. Real data, not hallucination.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT AI AGENT Is applicant APPL-1001 eligible for a premium rate item;

%md
## Ask About Authenticating Item Requirements

Try another question: what are Big Star Collectibles' authenticating item requirements?

**Watch the result:** Your actual authenticating item guidelines: minimum credit score 680, DTI under 43%, 10% down payment minimum, 2 years employment verification, senior appraiser required. The agent knows your procedures.

msg.data:
Ask About Authenticating Item Requirements

Try another question: what are Big Star Collectibles' authenticating item requirements?

Watch the result: Your actual authenticating item guidelines: minimum credit score 680, DTI under 43%, 10% down payment minimum, 2 years employment verification, senior appraiser required. The agent knows your procedures.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT AI AGENT What are the authenticating item requirements at Big Star Collectibles;

%md
## Ask About Risk Escalation

Ask about the escalation process for risky applications.

**Watch the result:** Your actual escalation process: initial assessment by agent, appraiser if DTI exceeds 35%, senior appraiser if credit below 650, manager review available. The agent knows your risk management procedures.

msg.data:
Ask About Risk Escalation

Ask about the escalation process for risky applications.

Watch the result: Your actual escalation process: initial assessment by agent, appraiser if DTI exceeds 35%, senior appraiser if credit below 650, manager review available. The agent knows your risk management procedures.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT AI AGENT What is the escalation process for high-risk item applications;

%md
## Verify the Agent Used Your Data

Look at the tool execution history to confirm the agent queried your enterprise data.

You should see ITEM_POLICY_TOOL and APPLICANT_LOOKUP_TOOL calls, with results from your actual tables. This proves the agent is using real data, not making things up.

msg.data:
Verify the Agent Used Your Data

Look at the tool execution history to confirm the agent queried your enterprise data.

You should see ITEM_POLICY_TOOL and APPLICANT_LOOKUP_TOOL calls, with results from your actual tables. This proves the agent is using real data, not making things up.

paragraphs.text:
%script
SELECT 
    tool_name,
    TO_CHAR(start_date, 'HH24:MI:SS') as called_at,
    SUBSTR(output, 1, 80) as result
FROM USER_AI_AGENT_TOOL_HISTORY
ORDER BY start_date DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY;

%md
## What You Learned

In this lab, you experienced the transformative power of enterprise data at Big Star Collectibles:

| Approach | Result |
|----------|--------|
| **SELECT AI CHAT** (LLM only) | Generic answers, no business knowledge |
| **SELECT AI AGENT** (with tools) | YOUR item guidelines, YOUR applicants, YOUR procedures |

**Key takeaway:** Agents don't fail because they're not smart. They fail because they don't know your business. Enterprise data is what transforms generic AI into Big Star Collectibles' AI.

The LLM provides the intelligence. Your database provides the knowledge. Together, they create an agent that actually understands your lending business.
